open_uncertainties: Whether the paper reports only a simulated design or also any fabricated/measured prototype beyond the simulation signals in the map.
The exact finalized antenna dimensions and whether the partial ground plane or other geometry details were selected after any design iteration.
Whether there are multiple candidate geometries or only one proposed rectangular patch design.
Whether the paper includes any explicit optimization step or only direct design calculations from the transmission line method.

search_queries.query_text: Rectangular Microstrip Patch Antenna Using Coaxial Probe Feeding Technique to Operate in S-Band
search_queries.why: Article-targeted query using the exact title to retrieve the paper and confirm the selected design context.
The paper_map repeatedly points to a proposed antenna structure; this should surface the main design figure and any final chosen geometry.
The paper includes a table of antenna parameters, which may contain the finalized dimensions and selected values.
The paper has a dedicated results section and simulated performance signals; this can help confirm whether the design was only simulated or also validated further.
The feed technique is a core unresolved design detail and is explicitly named in the title and abstract.
